tweets.aiAnalysis:
# Analysis

**Why it underperformed:** The tweet lacks emotional urgency or novelty—35% APY is presented as a static fact rather than a time-sensitive opportunity, and the "breakdown" of yield sources (staking + fees + incentives) is standard DeFi positioning that doesn't differentiate this offering. The multi-layered value proposition (reinsurance, JTO incentives, points multiplier) requires cognitive effort to parse, diluting impact for scrollers, and "capital efficiency" is an abstract benefit claim without concrete context (e.g., "vs. competing pools" or "highest on Solana").

The 11 likes suggest only existing Kamino users or JitoSOL enthusiasts engaged—the hook needed either a comparative claim ("3x better than X"), urgency ("limited incentive period"), or a surprising metric to break through noise.
